Publications

Theses and papers. More coming as my MSc research progresses.

Publications

[1] · BSc Thesis · 2025

Improvements to the Explanations of Ithaca's Chronological Attributions of Ancient Greek Inscriptions

M. Schoinaki. Athens University of Economics and Business, Dept. of Informatics. Supervisors: I. Androutsopoulos, J. Pavlopoulos, Y. Assael.

Improving the quality of the explanations produced by Ithaca, DeepMind's deep network for the restoration and attribution of ancient Greek inscriptions, focusing on its chronological attributions.

PDF / DOI Code
